text.title: Cross-Tool PM Migration — Process Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a symptom (observable signal) with root cause and concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Team jumps from Preparation directly to Full Migration.
antipattern.fix: Insert Pilot cohort with explicit success gate.

antipattern.symptom: Source tool decommissioned on cutover day.
antipattern.fix: Keep source read-only ≥30 days; test rollback in Pilot.

antipattern.symptom: Users discover the new tool by login failure.
antipattern.root-cause: no comms artefact in 14 days pre-cutover
